This zzover12 heading deliberately contains thirteen separate ordinary words exceeding the configured limit

SYSTEM ZZCAPS CONFIGURATION GUIDE

A zzverbless comprehensive catalogue of vendor names, product categories, regional offices and contact records

zznonalpha 12.5% :: 40/60 >> $$$ 3.14 ~~ 900

Finally zzrealnarr the reviewer summarized the outcome and approved the migration to the new pipeline.
